title: Personalize Your Windows Experience With Device Usage Settings
license_note: Screenshots from support.microsoft.com. Confirm redistribution with your legal team before use in a shipped product.

steps.text: In the Settings app on your Windows device,select Personalization or use the following shortcut: Personalization
Choose the ways you'll use your PC by switching the toggles to On ​​​​​​​

sections.title: What does Microsoft do with this data?

steps.text: Want more options? Discover Community Explore subscription benefits, browse training courses, learn how to secure your device, and more.
